verses.text: Israel kumpi, Elah' tapa Hoshea' kum thumna kumin Judah kumpi, Ahaz' tapa Hezekiah in uk ding kipan hi
Amah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmnihlenga pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnihlekua sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Abi hi a, Zekhariah' tanu ahi hi
A pu David' hihna khempeuh tawh kizui-in Topa' mitah a man gamta hi

Amah in mualtunga biaknate hemkhia-in biakna songte sutan a, Asherah milim phukpai hi. Tua ciangin amah in Moses' bawlsa sumngo gulpi satnen hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua ni dongin Israel mite in tua tungah paknamtui hal uh hi; tua pen Nehushtan kici hi
Amah in Israel Pasian, Topa muang hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama nunga Judah kumpite khempeuh lak hita leh ama mai-ate lak hita leh-ah amah tawh a kibang kuamah dang omlo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topa kiptakin len hi. Amah zuihna panin kihemkhia lo a, Topa in Moses tungah a gen thupiaknate a zui hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in amah ompih a, a sepna khempeuhah mavang hi. Amah in Assiria kumpipa lehdo-in ama na semlo hi
Amah in galvilna bukno-a kipan kulh a nei khuapi dongin, Gaza leh a gamsung ciangdong Filistia-te a vatgawp hi.
Israel kumpi, Elah' tapa Hoshea' kum sagihna kum ahi, Kumpi Hezekiah' kum lina kumin Assiria kumpi Shalmaneser, Samaria a simin hong kuanto-in umcih a
kum thum a beina-ah tua khua lazo hi. Israel kumpi Hoshea' kum kuana kum ahi, Hezekiah' kum gukna kumin Samaria kila hi
Assiria kumpipa in Israel mite Assiria-ah la a, Halah gamsung, Gozan gama om Habor gun gei, leh Media khuapite sungah a koih hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topa a Pasian uh thu manglo uh a, ama thuciamna, Topa' nasem Moses' thupiak khempeuh nangawn palsat uh hi. Amaute in thu ngailoin, thu zong manglo uh hi.
Kumpi Hezekiah' kum sawmlelina kumin Assiria kumpi Sennakherib, Judah khuapi kulh a neite khempeuh a sim dingin hong kuanto-in tuate a la hi

Tua ciangin Judah kumpi Hezekiah in Assiria kumpipa kiang Lakhish-ah mi sawlin, “Ka gamta khial hi; kei kiang panin nungkik in; kei tungah nong nget peuhpeuh kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa in Judah kumpi Hezekiah tung panin ngun talen za thum leh kham talen sawmthum a kal hi
Tua ciangin Hezekiah in Topa' biakinn sung leh kumpipa' inn vankoihnate-ah a om ngun khempeuh ama tungah a pia hi
Tua hunin Hezekiah in Topa' biakinn kongkhakte tung pan, leh amahmah in kongkhak mungte a zutna khamte hawkkhia-in Assiria kumpipa tungah a pia hi

Tua ciangin Assiria kumpipa in Lakhish panin Kumpi Hezekiah kiang Jerusalem-ah galkap hon lianpi khat tawh a galkapmang lianpenpa, a innsung mang lianpenpa, leh a ulian khat a sawl hi. Amaute paito-in Jerusalem tung uh hi. Amaute a tun' uh ciangin amaute hong pai-in Puansawppa' nasepna phual zuatna lampi-a om bual tungnung tuilakna gei-ah hong ding uh hi
Amaute in kumpipa a sap uh ciangin, amaute kiangah innsung ukpa ahi, Hilkiah' tapa Eliakim, lai-at Shebnah, leh thuciamtehpa ahi, Asaf' tapa Joah hong pai uh hi
Tua ciangin a ulianpa in amaute kiangah, “Hezekiah kiangah hih bangin gen un. ‘Assiria kumpipa, kumpi lianpa in hih bangin ci hi: Hih banga na kimuan'na uh bang suang na hi uh hiam
Note in kampau lel pen galsimna dingin thu lamlahna leh thahatna-in na ngaihsun uh hi. Note in kei nong lehdona dingun bang suang na hi uh hiam
En un, a tungah a kingam mipa' khut a sun ding pumpeeng kung kitam a banglel Egypt tu-in na suang uh hi. Amah a suangte khempeuh tungah Egypt kumpipa Faro pen tua banglel ahi hi

“ ‘Ahih hangin note in kei kiangah, “Kote in Topa ka Pasian uh ka suang uh hi,” na cih uh leh, Hezekiah in mualtunga biaknate leh biakna taute hepkhiatsakin Jerusalem tungah, “Jerusalem khuasung hih biakna tau mai-ah na bia ding uh hi,” a cihpa hilo ahi hiam
Tu-in hong pai un; Assiria kumpi ka topa tawh kikhapna khat bawl un; no lam panin a tunga tuang ding na ngah nak uh leh note tungah sakol tul nih kong pia ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin note in leengte leh sakol tung tuangte tawh kisai-in Egypt a suang kimlai in bangci-in ka topa' nasemte lakah a neupen galkap ukpa khat lehnawhzo ding na hi uh hiam
Tua thamloin, Topa tawh a kikop lopi-in hih mun simin a susia dingin a hong paito ka hi hiam? Topa in kei kiangah, “Hih gam a sim dingin paito in la susia in,” hong ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Hilkiah' tapa Eliakim, Shebnah, leh Joah in a ulianpa kiangah, “Kong thum uh hi; kote in Aram pau thei ka hih manun na nasemte tungah Aram pau-in thu hong gen in; kulh tunga om mite' zakin Jew pau-in kote' tungah hong gen kei in,” a ci uh hi

Ahih hangin a ulianpa in amaute kiangah, “Ka topa in hih thute na topa uh leh note tung bekah a gen dingin hong sawlin, amau' ek mah ne-in, amau' zun mah dawnin note tawh a siakhawm ding kulh tunga tu mite kiangah a genlo dingin hong sawl ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a ulianpa dingin Jew pau-in a gingin kiko a, “Assiria kumpi, kumpi lianpa' thu za un
Kumpipa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Hezekiah' khemsa-in om kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in keima khutsung panin note hong honkhia zolo ding hi
Topa in eite hong honkhia taktak ding a, Assiria kumpipa' khutsungah hih khuapi kipialo ding hi, ci-a Hezekiah' hong genna tawh Topa suang kei un,’ ci hi

Hezekiah' thu ngai kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Assiria kumpipa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Kei tawh kilemna hong bawl un la, kei kiangah hong pai un. Tua hi leh kei hong pai-in nomau' leitang tawh a kibatna mun, an leh leenggahzu a omna, oliv kungte leh khuaizu a omna gamah, note siloin na nuntakna dingun kong koih dong matengin note khempeuh in nomau' leenggah ciat ne-in, mi khempeuh in a theigah ciat uh ne ding uh a, note khempeuh in na tuinak ciat uh panin tui na tawi ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in note kiangah, “ Topa in eite hong honkhia ding hi,” ci-in note hong lamlah khialhna-ah Hezekiah' thu ngai kei un
Assiria kumpipa' khutsung panin minam dangte' pasian khatpeuh in a gam honkhiazo ngei ahi hiam
Hamath leh Arpad' pasian-te koi-ah om ahi uh hiam? Sefarvaim, Hena, leh Ivvah pasian-te koi-ah om ahi uh hiam? Keima khutsung panin amaute in Samaria a honkhiazo uh hiam
Topa in ka khutsung panin Jerusalem a hotkhiatna dingin, gamsungah pasian-te khempeuh lakah kua in keima khutsung panin a gam uh honkhiazo ngei ahi hiam?’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin mite dai-in kam khat beek dawngkiklo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kumpipa' thupiakna pen, “Amah dawng kei un,” cihna ahi hi

Tua ciangin innsung a uk, Hilkiah' tapa Eliakim, lai-atpa Shebnah, leh thuciamtehpa, Asaf' tapa Joah-te a puan uh balkeksa-in Hezekiah kiangah hong pai uh a, a ulianpa' kammalte ama kiangah a gen uh hi.
